titleStmt.title: SII 22.557: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 557. (A.R. No. 557 of 1906) CHITTOOR DISTRICT, PUNGANUR TALUK, AGASTYAKOṆḌA Agastyēśvara temple-On the north wall

summary.p: This is dated merely in the cyclic year Kīlaka and Āṉi 15. It registers the appointment of one Sāmagaṉ Dēvaṉ for the post of uvachchakkāṇi in the temple with the title Tiruvagatti-mārāyan attached to his name by the authorities (sthānattār) of the temple of Agattinātar. The post carried with it the enjoyment of some lands (specified) and house site as remuneration.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kilakavarucattu Āṉi mātam karu ti Akattinātar koyilil tānattārum śrīmā
yeśvaranampi cikāriyañ ceyvikiṟṟavarkaḷum nallanāyarum cāmakaṉ tevanuk
ku Uvaccukāṇikku tiruvakattimārāya neṉṟu peruṅ kuṭuttu cattirakkuṭṭaiyi
l 9 kaḻaniyum neṟkuntiyil Añcu kuḷakkollaiyum mulattānattukku Etir maṟaiyum
Akatticura nattalum viṭṭappa nallūr nallūr neṟkunti toṟu Uḷḷa paḷḷi śivapura
m Ivvūril piṭārikoyil pūcitti muttaiyum kuṭuttu cantrātittavaraikku trisandhiyum
cevikka kaṭavaṉāka cammatittu Uvaccukāṇi kuṭuttom tānattārom .
Digital edition of SII 22.557 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
